prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 10101→8432→8096→8137→8700，整体呈先升后稳趋势，2022–2024 年稳定在 8100–8400 区间，2025 年小幅后移至 8700 名，近 3 年累计后移约 600 名；2025 年基准约 8700 名；本省物理类（含理科）计划 2021 年 57 人、2022–2023 年各 55 人、2024 年 62 人、2025 年 61 人；2026 年计划 63 人，较 2025 年增加 2 人，小幅扩招约 3.3%，按供需弹性模型推算位次略有后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学（校本部）为 985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜约第 38 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 36–39 名区间；秦皇岛分校共享校本部办学层次与学位，在云南考生中认可度较高；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及校区认知争议，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 82 位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现报考热度异常信号；依托东北大学控制科学与工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、机械工程 A-、材料科学与工程 A-、软件工程 A- 等优势学科，秦皇岛分校开设的自动化类、计算机类、机械类等专业与校本部学科体系一致，对工科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、自动化、电子信息等工 科专业社会热度持续偏高；云南省 2026 年高考总报名约 37.79 万人，较 2025 年（约 28.57 万人）大幅增加约 32%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约 22.9 万人，竞争加剧明显；东北大学秦皇岛分校位于河北省秦皇岛市，属东北大学异地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 8700 名、2026 年计划小幅扩招 2 人（约 3.3%）使位次略有后移、以及云南省考生总数大幅增长约 32% 导致竞争加剧，考虑考生规模激增的竞争压力，预计最低位次进一步后移至约 8950 名，区间 8700–9200 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化）
- 电子信息工程/通信工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、应用统计学、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 物联网工程
- 机械类（机械工程、车辆工程）
- 仪器类（测控技术与仪器、光电信息科学与工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（材料成型及控制工程、材料科学与工程、冶金工程等）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学、健康服务与管理）
- 经济学类（经济学、金融学、国际经济与贸易）
- 信息管理与信息系统
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 8700–9200 名以内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<8700 名）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、自动化类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>9200 名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入该校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 10101→8432→8096→8137→8700, showing an initial rise followed by stabilization. From 2022 to 2024, it stabilized in the 8100–8400 range, with a slight shift to 8700 in 2025, a cumulative shift of about 600 places over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 8700. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category (including Science) was 57 in 2021, 55 each in 2022–2023, 62 in 2024, and 61 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 63, an increase of 2 from 2025, a small expansion of about 3.3%, which, according to the supply-demand elasticity model, suggests a slight backward shift in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (main campus) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 38th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with a stable range of 36–39 in recent years. The Qinhuangdao campus shares the main campus's level and degrees, and is well-recognized among Yunnan examinees. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus recognition disputes, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 82nd, rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no abnormal signals in application popularity. Relying on Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines such as Control Science and Engineering (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Mechanical Engineering (A-), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), and Software Engineering (A-), the Qinhuangdao campus offers majors like Automation, Computer Science, and Mechanical Engineering, consistent with the main campus's discipline system, strongly attracting engineering examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Automation, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. The total number of Yunnan Province college entrance examination registrations in 2026 is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (approximately 285,700). Based on historical proportions, Physics Category examinees are estimated at about 229,000, indicating intensified competition. Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province, as a branch campus of Northeastern University.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8700, the small expansion of 2 places (about 3.3%) in the 2026 plan causing a slight backward shift, and the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of examinees in Yunnan Province leading to intensified competition, the minimum ranking is expected to further shift to approximately 8950, with a range of 8700–9200.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Electronic Information Engineering / Communication Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Internet of Things Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Instrumentation (Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, etc.)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Information Management and Information Systems
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8700–9200, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<8700), you can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Science and Technology and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>9200), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年历史类（含文科）最低位次约 2845→2364→2251→2389，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小），2023–2024 年连续前移，2025 年小幅后移至 2389 名；2025 年基准约 2389 名；本省历史类（含文科）计划 2022–2023 年各 2 人、2024 年 4 人、2025 年 6 人；2026 年计划 6 人，与 2025 年持平，计划无变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学（校本部）为 985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜约第 38 名（2026 年）；秦皇岛分校共享办学层次，在文科考生中因招生人数极少（仅 6 人）而竞争较为激烈；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，抖音热度一般，未见明显负面舆情或投档异常信号；东北大学以工科见长，文科类优势学科较少；秦皇岛分校历史类招生专业仅民族 学、外国语言文学类、经济学类，学科评估支撑有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济学类社会热度平稳偏分化，外国语言文学类热度降温，民族学属冷门专业；云南省 2026 年高考总报名约 37.79 万人，较 2025 年大幅增加，按历史比例估算历史类考生约 14.9 万人，竞争加剧；东北大学秦皇岛分校位于河北，在云南历史类招生仅 6 人，招生规模极小，位次波动受个别考生报考行为影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2389 名、2026 年招生计划持平、云南省考生总数大幅增长约 32% 导致竞争加剧，以及该校历史类招生专业偏冷门、招生人数极少等因素，考虑考生规模激增的竞争压力，预计最低位次小幅后移至约 2420 名，区间 2300–2540 名。

一档（最难进）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 History Category (including Liberal Arts) minimum rankings approximately 2845→2364→2251→2389, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with consecutive advances in 2023–2024, and a slight backward shift to 2389 in 2025; 2025 baseline approximately 2389; provincial History Category (including Liberal Arts) plan 2 each in 2022–2023, 4 in 2024, 6 in 2025; 2026 plan 6, unchanged from 2025, no change in plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (main campus) is a 985, 211, Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 38th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026); Qinhuangdao campus shares the school level, with relatively intense competition among liberal arts candidates due to extremely small enrollment (only 6); 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, Douyin popularity average, no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal submission signals; Northeastern University is strong in engineering, with fewer advantageous disciplines in liberal arts; Qinhuangdao campus History Category enrollment majors only Ethnology, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Economics, with limited disciplinary evaluation support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics social popularity stable but polarized, Foreign Languages and Literatures popularity cooling, Ethnology is a niche major; Yunnan Province 2026 total college entrance exam registrations approximately 377,900, significantly increased from 2025, estimated History Category candidates about 149,000 by historical proportion, competition intensifies; Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Hebei, with only 6 History Category enrollments in Yunnan, extremely small enrollment scale, ranking fluctuations greatly affected by individual candidate application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2389, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, significant increase of about 32% in total Yunnan candidates leading to intensified competition, and the relatively niche History Category majors with extremely small enrollment, taking into account the competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers, the minimum ranking is expected to slightly shift backward to approximately 2420, with a range of 2300–2540.
